title: dorstenia erecta var. minor
intro: Dorstenia erecta var. minor, also known as the lesser cat's claw or cat's claw vine, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Moraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dorstenia erecta var. minor include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
